overview: Epic grand strategy game covering 400 years of history from 1444 to 1821. Lead any nation through diplomacy, trade, warfare, and colonization. Build an empire through careful management of economy, military, technology, and international relations.

terminology.Coalition: Alliance of nations against aggressive player
terminology.CB: Casus Belli - valid reason for war
terminology.HRE: Holy Roman Empire - central European coalition
terminology.PU: Personal Union - dynastic control over another nation
terminology.Ducats: Gold currency for trade and economy
terminology.Revanchism: Temporary power boost after losing territory

commonQuestions: Which nation should I start with?
How do I manage monarch power efficiently?
What ideas should I take first?
How do I win wars efficiently?
How do I develop my economy?
How do I deal with rebels?
What's the best way to expand?
insiderTips: Always keep a diplomatic reputation advisor - prevents coalition wars
Improve relations with outraged nations to prevent coalitions from forming
Develop provinces in your capital state area first for maximum efficiency
Take Influence ideas early if you plan to vassalize nations
Never fight a war without a clear war goal - WS efficiency matters
Check coalition map mode before declaring war to see who might join against you
Use vassals to feed them land and avoid AE on yourself
Tech up military tech levels 5, 11, 15, and 21 ASAP - major power spikes
Always be at war somewhere - idle armies cost money and waste opportunities
Balance expansion with consolidation - don't overextend too fast
Keep 1-2 Military Power banked for generals and emergencies
Use claims fabrication to reduce AE and core cost
Monitor trade nodes - shifting trade power is often better than collecting

progressionSystem.startingPower: Choose any nation from 1444 start date
progressionSystem.midGame: Colonial expansion, institutional spread, major wars (1500-1650)
progressionSystem.goalTypes: Custom goals, achievements, score ranking, or role-play

ideaGroups.military: Quality, Quantity, Offensive, Defensive, Aristocratic, Naval, Maritime

estimatedPlaytime: Single campaign: 20-100+ hours, endless replayability with different nations
